examples: It is possible to have a microeconomic success and a macroeconomic failure, as Britain did in the late eighties.
A bold microeconomic agenda will not yield instant rewards.
United States also has its own microeconomic to-do list, albeit of a different sort.
They are trying to take basic microeconomic ideas and apply them to more complex macroeconomic situations.
In 1984 Lord Lawson argued that chancellors should assign distinct roles to macroeconomic and microeconomic policy.
